text.title: Speech-to-Text Advanced Procedure
text.summary: Five-step procedure for an advanced TranscriptionService.

step.name: gather-requirements
step.input: use case + audio source + privacy + latency
step.action: Enumerate needs: diarisation? word timestamps? vocab boost? streaming?

step.name: pick-provider
step.action: Route: streaming → Deepgram/AssemblyAI/Azure; diarisation + word ts → Deepgram or AssemblyAI; privacy on-prem → faster-whisper with pyannote diarisation.
step.decision-gate: If chosen provider doesn't natively support all requirements → re-pick.

step.name: wire-capabilities
step.action: Pass diarize=true + speaker_hint + word_timestamps + vocab_boost as provider parameters.
step.output: provider call with full param set

step.name: post-process
step.action: Punctuation restore (if needed), filler removal ("uh"/"um"), abbreviation expansion policy.

step.name: emit-and-audit
step.action: Emit {ts, provider, language, speakers, words, segments, cost_usd} to audit; persist transcript next to the audio.
